name: 4pc Stainless Steel Measuring Cup Copper - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bake or cook with precision with the help of these 4-Piece Stainless Steel Measuring Cups from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This set includes four measuring cups in varying sizes — 1 cup, 1/2 cup, 1/3 cup and 1/4 cup — with easy-to-read markings on the handles for precise addition of ingredients. Made of stainless steel and designed in a copper finish, these measuring cups feature hanging handles with a metal ring for easy storage.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
